audit.title: My Activity
audit.subtitle: Every action you have performed across your projects — cryptographically recorded and tamper-evident.
exports.title: Export History
exports.subtitle: Documents you export download directly to your device.
exports.emptyDesc: Export any document using the Export button in the document editor. Files download directly to your device.
dmp.subtitle2: AI-assisted DMP generation, pre-filled from your actual project data, in the exact format each funder requires.
dmp.fundersNote: Supports NIH, Wellcome Trust, ERC, Gates Foundation, and Horizon Europe formats.
dmp.feature.aiDesc: Auto-fill DMPs from actual project data: dataset schemas, storage details, access controls, ethics status, and sharing settings.
dmp.feature.funderDesc: Ready-made templates for NIH, Wellcome Trust, ERC, Gates Foundation, and Horizon Europe — formatted to each funder's exact requirements.
dmp.feature.editableDesc: Generated DMPs are saved as editable PLEXUS documents. Researchers review, refine, and add context before submission.
dmp.feature.pdfDesc: Export the final DMP as a PDF in the funder's required format, ready to upload to grant portals.
dmp.feature.livingDesc: Update DMPs as your project evolves — data collection expands, new datasets are added, or sharing plans change.

entryPoint.guideDesc: Answer a few questions and PLEXUS will recommend the best statistical test for your data and research question.
entryPoint.directDesc: Pick from 15 analysis types, configure variables, and run immediately. Full control over every parameter.
entryPoint.bothSameEngine: Both paths use the same analysis engine. You can switch at any time.

hubTable.title: Hub Table Generator
hubTable.template.table1Desc: Demographics and clinical characteristics for your study population. Supports stratified columns across multiple groups or time points by selecting multiple descriptive analysis runs.
hubTable.template.table2Desc: Odds ratios, hazard ratios, or regression coefficients with confidence intervals and significance stars. Supports logistic, linear, Cox, Poisson, and other regression analyses.
hubTable.template.table3Desc: Median survival time, event counts, and 95% confidence intervals for Kaplan–Meier or Cox proportional hazard analyses.

intentSelector.describe.desc: Summarise the characteristics of my study population

intentSelector.associate.desc: Is there an association between two variables?
intentSelector.predict.title: Predict an outcome
intentSelector.predict.desc: What factors predict or cause my outcome?
intentSelector.compare.title: Compare groups
intentSelector.compare.desc: Do two or more groups differ on a measure?
intentSelector.survive.title: Analyse time to event
intentSelector.survive.desc: How long until an event occurs? Survival analysis
intentSelector.explore.title: Explore patterns
intentSelector.explore.desc: Find clusters or patterns in my dataset
recommendation.allChecksPassed: All checks passed. Ready to run.
recommendation.someChecksFailed: Some checks failed. Review before running.
researchContext.title: Research Context
researchContext.subtitle: Tailors assumption checks and sensitivity analysis
sens.label.censoring10: 10% of censored subjects had informative censoring
sens.label.censoring20: 20% of censored subjects had informative censoring
sens.label.censoring35: 35% of censored subjects had informative censoring
sens.label.censoring50: 50% of censored subjects had informative censoring
sens.interp.directionReversed: Direction reversed under this level of confounding
sens.interp.effectNoLonger: Effect no longer significant — confounding of this magnitude could explain the result
sens.interp.effectNoLongerOVB: Effect no longer significant — an omitted variable of this size could explain the result
sens.interp.directionReversedDegree: Direction reversed under this degree of confounding
sens.interp.eventRateMeaningful: Meaningful increase in event rate — informative censoring would substantially alter conclusions
sens.interp.eventRateRobust: Event rate remains in a similar range — conclusions are robust to this level of informative censoring
sens.interp.contamNegligible: Effect size negligible under this contamination level
sens.interp.contamSubstantial: Substantial attenuation — contamination meaningfully reduces effect
sens.interp.contamPreserved: Effect direction and magnitude largely preserved
sens.interp.tTrivial: Effect size trivial — measurement error could eliminate the effect
sens.interp.tSmall: Small effect remains — conclusions largely unchanged
sens.interp.tLarge: Medium-to-large effect preserved despite measurement error
sens.interp.corrNegligible: Correlation negligible — measurement error could explain the association
sens.interp.corrWeak: Weak correlation — some attenuation but effect persists
sens.interp.corrStrong: Moderate-to-strong correlation preserved despite measurement error
sens.interp.misclassNegligible: Association negligible under this misclassification level
sens.interp.misclassSubstantial: Substantial attenuation — misclassification meaningfully reduces association
landing.hero.badge: Built for students, PhDs, and early-career researchers
landing.hero.sub: Run analysis, generate results, and export your research — with every step automatically documented.
landing.hero.globeCaption: Designed for researchers everywhere — wherever your field takes you →
landing.bento.hub.label: Your research hub
landing.bento.hub.title: Everything in one view
landing.bento.hub.desc: See all your projects, data, and results without switching between tools.
landing.bento.trail.label: Your research trail
landing.bento.trail.title: Every step, automatically recorded
landing.bento.trail.desc: From data import to final results, everything is tracked — so you can always show how your work was done.
landing.bento.analysis.label: Built-in analysis
landing.bento.analysis.title: Run the right analysis, every time
landing.bento.analysis.desc: Regression, survival analysis, and more — without complicated setup.
landing.bento.supervisor.title: Supervisor Workflows Built In.
landing.bento.supervisor.item1: Your supervisor reviews and approves your work before you move forward
landing.bento.supervisor.item2: Role-based access for students, supervisors, and departments
landing.bento.supervisor.item3: Every approval is saved — so your process is always traceable
landing.roles.heading: Built for every role.
landing.roles.desc: Whether you’re just starting out or leading a team, Plexus fits how you work.
landing.roles.students.label: Students
landing.roles.students.desc: Design your study, collect data, and run analysis — all guided, step by step.
landing.roles.supervisors.label: Supervisors
landing.roles.supervisors.desc: Review your students’ work, give feedback, and approve results — all in one place.
landing.roles.departments.label: Departments
landing.roles.departments.desc: See what every team is working on and keep research on track.
landing.roles.institutions.label: Institutions
landing.roles.institutions.desc: A single platform for all your research — secure, organized, and always audit-ready.
landing.howItWorks.heading: From data to paper, in three steps.
landing.howItWorks.desc: No manual tracking. No messy workflows. Everything is captured automatically.
landing.howItWorks.step1.title: Import your data
landing.howItWorks.step1.desc: Upload from your tools or spreadsheets — we handle the rest.
landing.howItWorks.step2.title: Run your analysis
landing.howItWorks.step2.desc: Choose what you want to discover — we suggest the right approach and run it for you.
landing.howItWorks.step3.title: Export your results
landing.howItWorks.step3.desc: Download tables, methods, and your full research record — ready for submission or defence.
landing.cta.heading: Turn your data into results.
landing.cta.desc: Built for students, researchers, and teams who need clarity, speed, and confidence.
landing.footer.copyright: © 2026 PLEXUS Research. All rights reserved. Research made simple, everywhere.
authPanel.desc: Run analysis, write up your findings, and export everything — all in one place.
authPanel.feature1.title: Every step, automatically saved
authPanel.feature1.desc: From data import to final results, nothing gets lost or forgotten.
authPanel.feature2.title: Run the right analysis
authPanel.feature2.desc: We guide you to the right method and run it — no statistics degree required.
authPanel.feature3.title: Work with your supervisor
authPanel.feature3.desc: Share results, get feedback, and move forward — together, in one place.

supervision.inbox.title: Feedback Inbox
supervision.inbox.emptyDesc: No unresolved notes across your students.
supervision.sessions.title: Sessions
supervision.sessions.emptyDesc: Your supervisor's session notes will appear here after your meetings
supervision.notes.noNotes: No notes yet — your supervisor's feedback will appear here
